fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table to be migrated.

fields.name: No. of Records
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records in the table to be migrated.

fields.name: Selected
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the table will be migrated. If the check box is selected, then the table will be migrated.

fields.name: Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total monetary value, in your local currency, of all entities in the table.
